installCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.33.0 --activate && cd docs-site && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
buildCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.33.0 --activate && cd docs-site && pnpm build
ignoreCommand: git diff --quiet HEAD^ HEAD -- docs-site/ prd/ diagrams/ vercel.json || exit 1
